reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Deberian mejorar el número de surtidores disponibles. Un domingo turno de 20 hs en adelante solo hay 2 empleados que habilitan 2 islas con lo que se arman largas filas de espera. Mejorable.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. They should increase the number of available pumps. On Sundays, from 8 pm onwards, there are only two employees operating two pump islands, resulting in long lines. Needs improvement.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNmJLUGlnRRAB
